name: pnp-list-formatting-credit-card
title: Credit / Loyalty Card
shortDescription: This SharePoint JSON view formatting sample transforms list items into realistic credit / loyalty cards with a chip, embossed card number, cardholder, expiry and tier-driven colour.
longDescription: This SharePoint JSON view formatting sample transforms list items into realistic credit / loyalty cards.
Each item renders as a plastic-card with a brand name, tier pill, EMV chip, contactless symbol, card number, cardholder name, expiry and network logo. The card colour is driven by the Tier value.

references.name: Use view formatting to customize SharePoint
references.description: You can use view formatting to customize how items in SharePoint lists and libraries are displayed.
